summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PO/Placement workflow refactoring. All backend APIs pass (12/13 tests, 1 skipped due to no collected batches). Frontend Placement page fully functional with product type badges, scan flow, and placement confirmation working correctly.

issues: Missing Description or aria-describedby warning in console - accessibility warning, no functional impact

passed_tests: GET /api/batches/pending-placement - returns batches with 'en_attente_placement' status with product info including type
POST /api/batches/scan-for-placement - correctly identifies Case B (from PO) for pending batches
POST /api/batches/scan-for-placement - correctly identifies Case C (unknown) for unknown serial numbers
POST /api/batches/scan-for-placement - correctly identifies 'already_in_stock' for available batches
POST /api/batches/confirm-placement - validates product type against location type (returns error for incompatible types)
POST /api/batches/confirm-placement - rejects missing batch_id with 400 error
POST /api/batches/confirm-placement - rejects missing location with 400 error
POST /api/batches/confirm-placement - rejects invalid location with 404 error
POST /api/batches/confirm-placement - successfully places batch and updates status to 'disponible'
POST /api/purchase-orders/{po_id}/receive-item - creates batch with 'en_attente_placement' status and no location
GET /api/locations - returns locations with allowed_product_type field
Frontend: Placement page displays pending batches with product type badges (purple badges)
Frontend: Scan flow works correctly for existing batches in 'en_attente_placement' status
Frontend: Unknown serial dialog appears for Case C
Frontend: Step 2 (location confirmation) displays product type badge
Frontend: Complete placement flow works - batch placed successfully with success toast
skipped_tests: POST /api/batches/scan-for-placement Case A (collected items) - No batches with 'sorti' or 'collecte' status available for testing
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in server.py is correct - specific routes (/batches/pending-placement, /batches/scan-for-placement, /batches/confirm-placement) are defined before parameterized route (/batches/{batch_id})
Product type validation in confirm-placement endpoint works correctly
receive-item endpoint correctly creates batches with 'en_attente_placement' status and null localisation
Frontend Placement.js correctly displays product type badges using batch.product.type
seed_data_creation: Created test batches via receive-item endpoint during testing (TEST-RECEIVE-* serial numbers)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PO/Placement workflow refactoring is complete and working. Key endpoints: /api/batches/pending-placement (GET), /api/batches/scan-for-placement (POST), /api/batches/confirm-placement (POST). Product type validation is enforced - locations with allowed_product_type will reject incompatible products. Test batches created: SN-TEST-002 was placed at A-R02-C01. Remaining pending batches: 150232 (Cathéter 12), TEST-RECEIVE-* (Stent).
